name: Gambela Region (Ethiopia)

colors.symbolism: drawn from the Ethiopian national flag
drawn from the Ethiopian national flag — fertility and the land
the peoples of the region; the central star

description: Four horizontal stripes — red, white, green, and black from top to bottom — with a black five-pointed star at the centre.
history: The Gambela Region is one of the regional states of the Federal Democratic Republic of Ethiopia, established under the 1995 Constitution. The flag combines the Ethiopian national colours with black to represent the region's peoples and a central star.
